title: Showcaser
description: Share items, fluids, recipes and quests with a single keybind!
body:
### Requirements:
  - Architectury API

### Supported mods:
  - EMI
  - Roughly Enough Items
  - Just Enough Items
  - Applied Energistics 2
  - FTB Quests
  - Patchouli

  Although not many mods listed, Showcaser allows you to share items from many modded screens!

## Features

- **Support for custom item stack tooltips**. You can share enchanted diamond sword, Create's mod item with ponder attached to it, or AE2's item cell and tooltip will display custom content or handle custom actions
  
- **Verified by the server marker**. Items that are getting shared from inventories that are controlled by the server are marked as verified, allowing you to flex with things you've got!
  
- **Clickable messages**. Shared recipes and quests are hooked up to click event, allowing you to open them by clicking on the message

![Different shared things in chat](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a7c8ce869d1a48d7db99e6f4006ec3da2f9a8309.png)

## How to use
By default share keybind is _Shift + X_

Everything is pretty straightforward:

- Item -> hover the slot and press the keybind
  
- EMI's / REI's / JEI's recipe -> hover resource and use the share keybind
  
- FTB Quest -> open quest you want to share and press the keybind
  
- Patchouli -> open book and share the book itself or proceed to entry you need and share it

---

**Showcaser must be installed on client and server side to work properly**

If you want to learn about configs and server commands mod provides check our [github page](https://github.com/Lolens/showcaser)!
